response.justification: Exceeds experience requirements with 10+ years fullstack expertise, strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation, and demonstrable AI agent infrastructure experience (explicitly required). Excellent engineering practices and enterprise-scale systems design. Main gaps are specific frameworks (Nest.js, Jest/Vitest) and PostgreSQL—learnable for this seniority level.
strengths: 10+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript/Node.js mastery proven across multiple enterprise-scale systems handling millions of requests/second
Direct AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development experience—exact match for stated requirement
Demonstrated software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, architecture practices, and proven full-stack ownership from infrastructure to frontend
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite being primary backend requirement; prior Node.js work uses custom/alternative frameworks
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) and PostgreSQL not mentioned despite extensive TDD background—tool specificity unclear
Most recent substantial fullstack work at Optilyz focused on pricing optimization; current role too new (1 month) to assess scope
